debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqType : BasicRequest
tId : ThreadId
prelimReq : Request := ⋯
previous : List Request := ⋯
removed : List Request := ⋯
occurrences : List Nat := ⋯
req : Request := ⋯
pairedRequest? : Option Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts:
by
       intro id hid
       exact state.requests.removed_ids_in_active id hid

by
       intro id hid
       exact (state.removedCoherent id hid)

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using state.requests.mem_reqIds_of_mem_removed (id := id) hid

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [reqIds] using hid

by
       intro id hid
       exact state.removedCoherent id hid

by
       intro id hid
       cases hid

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using this

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := this
       -- the coherence invariant is preserved because `requests'` only grows w.r.t. `state.requests`
       -- and `reqIds` contains all ids from the inserted requests; removed ids remain tracked.
       -- This follows from the definition of `reqIds` and `RequestArray.insert`.
       simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
       intro id hid
       exact state.removedCoherent id hid

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using hid

by
      intro id hid
      have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
      simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [reqIds] using hid

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [reqIds] using hid

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
      intro id hid
      have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
      simpa [requests'] using this

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using this

by
       intro id hid
       simpa using state.removedCoherent id hid

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests'] using state.removedCoherent id this

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using this

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [reqIds] using this

by
      intro id hid
      simpa [reqIds] using hid

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using hid

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [requests'] using state.requests.removed_mem_reqIds_insert (id := id) hid

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ reqIds state.requests := state.removedCoherent id hid
       cases pairedRequest? <;> simp [requests', RequestArray.insert, reqIds, this]

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
       intro id hid
       have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] }

by
       intro id hid
       exact state.requests.ids_contains_of_removed_id hid

by
       intro id hid
       simpa [requests', reqIds] using state.removedCoherent id hid
